description:
Offered: every other Spring
The principles and applications of classical mechanics and heat are studied using the language of calculus. Credit cannot be earned for both PHYS 2300 and PHYS 2600.
Prerequisite(s): MATH 2300
Note: Where PHYS 2300 is specified as a requirement, PHYS 2600 may be substituted.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL, SI
